preconditions: Login page is opened at URL http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/login?data=undefined
Login page displays username textbox, password textbox, SIGN IN button, back navigation button, and home navigation button

testCases.title: Verify login page loads and all required UI elements are visible
steps: Verify username_textbox, password_textbox, sign_in_button, home_navigation_button and back_navigation_button are displayed
testCases.expectedResult: Login page loads successfully and username_textbox, password_textbox, SIGN IN button, home_navigation_button and back_navigation_button are visible and enabled for user interaction

testCases.title: Verify successful login with valid username and password
testCases.expectedResult: User authentication succeeds and application redirects to home page with URL http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home and login page is no longer displayed

testCases.title: Verify login fails with invalid username and valid password
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication is rejected, an error or sign-in failure message is displayed, and the browser remains on the login page without redirecting to the home page

testCases.title: Verify login fails with valid username and incorrect password
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, a visible login error message is displayed, and the application remains on the login page without redirecting to the home page

testCases.title: Verify login fails when both username and password are invalid
testCases.expectedResult: Login attempt is rejected, a visible authentication failure message appears, and the page remains on the login URL without navigation to the home page

testCases.title: Verify validation when username field is empty
testCases.expectedResult: Login submission is blocked, a validation or error indication appears for username_textbox, and the login page remains displayed without redirecting to the home page

testCases.title: Verify validation when password field is empty
testCases.expectedResult: Login submission is prevented, a validation or error indication appears for password_textbox, and the user remains on the login page

testCases.title: Verify validation when both username and password fields are empty
testCases.expectedResult: Submission is rejected, validation messages or visual error indicators appear for both fields, and the login page remains displayed without navigation

testCases.title: Verify password field masks entered characters
testCases.expectedResult: Characters typed into password_textbox appear masked as dots or bullet characters and the actual text value is not visible on the screen

testCases.title: Verify home navigation button redirects user to home page
testCases.expectedResult: Application navigates to the home page and the browser URL changes to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home

testCases.title: Verify back navigation button redirects user to home page
testCases.expectedResult: Application navigates away from the login page and loads the home page with URL http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home

testCases.title: Verify login behavior when username contains leading and trailing spaces
steps: Enter space hacklarr space in username_textbox
testCases.expectedResult: System either trims the whitespace and authenticates the user successfully redirecting to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home, or rejects the login attempt with a visible error while remaining on the login page

testCases.title: Verify login attempt using whitespace-only values
testCases.expectedResult: System rejects the login attempt, displays a validation or authentication error message, and remains on the login page without redirecting to the home page

testCases.title: Verify system behavior when SIGN IN button is clicked multiple times rapidly
testCases.expectedResult: Application processes the authentication request only once and redirects to the home page a single time without duplicate requests, page errors, or unexpected behavior

testCases.title: Verify login attempt with very long username and password values
steps: Enter a very long string exceeding typical username length in username_textbox
Enter a very long string exceeding typical password length in password_textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Application safely rejects the authentication attempt and remains on the login page without UI breakage, application crash, or unexpected navigation

testCases.title: Verify login submission using Enter key from password field
steps: Press Enter key while cursor focus is inside password_textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Pressing Enter triggers the login action and the user is successfully authenticated and redirected to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home

testCases.title: Verify login using copy and paste for credentials
steps: Copy the value hacklarr and paste it into username_textbox
Copy the value Icstunnel1 and paste it into password_textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Pasted credentials are accepted as valid input and user authentication succeeds with redirection to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home
